name: Workshop Manager
description: Oversees production scheduling and workshop operations

name: Bench Joiner
description: Cuts joints and assembles frames and carcasses

name: Cabinetmaker
description: Builds fine cabinets and bespoke furniture

name: Machinist
description: Operates saws planers and spindle moulders

name: CNC Operator
description: Programmes and runs the CNC router

name: Sawyer
description: Breaks down boards and sheet stock to size

name: Sprayer
description: Spray-applies lacquers and coatings in the booth

name: Fitter
description: Fits hardware and installs finished work

name: Sander
description: Sands and prepares surfaces for finishing

name: Storeperson
description: Manages materials stock and goods dispatch

name: Apprentice
description: Trainee working across benches under supervision
